# nulite (trimmed) — test fixture

A **trimmed, representative slice** of the [nulite](https://github.com/codingpotions/nulite)
Eleventy starter (author: codingpotions; `package.json` declares ISC), vendored **only** as a
fixture to exercise the Eleventy-Liquid import transform + render path. CSS partials are
shortened; not the full theme. Not shipped in any build.
